proposed_relations.description: Bus Lane Camera enforcement on First and Second Avenues for M15 SBS

evidence_refs.source_quote: Summons issued through Bus Lane Camera program: 5,800

rationale: Page 7 (M15 SBS Performance section) of the M15 SBS CB6 presentation reports Bus Lane Camera program summons on First and Second Avenues, confirming camera enforcement as part of the project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Summons issued through Bus Lane Camera program: 5,800

quarantine.note: The treatment record (treatment_bus-lane-camera-enforcement) is explicitly scoped to 34th Street: its display_name is 'Bus lane camera enforcement on 34th Street', its sole source is '201110_brt_34th_cac5', and its payload description says 'on 34th Street, part of 2011 planned improvements.' The cited evidence blocks (p007_c0013, p007_c0014) come from a different source (2011_05_02_brt_1st2nd_cb6 — the First/Second Avenue SBS presentation) and describe camera enforcement on First and Second Avenues, not 34th Street. The evidence does not connect this 34th-Street-specific treatment to the First/Second Avenue SBS project. A different treatment record would be needed for First/Second Avenue camera enforcement.
